{{ og_all_tags }} {{ canonical_tag }} {{ auto_includes_css }}
Docs Examples

Fast by default.
Yours by design.

A static site generator built with Crystal. No themes, no lock-in. Your content, your structure, your speed.

Get started

1,000 pages. Under a second.

Median cold build on the open SSG benchmark, minimal workload: pure markdown to HTML.

0.00s

The bar fills in real time: 443 ms, one full rebuild.

  • minimal markdown to HTML 0.44s
  • blog tags, pagination, feeds 0.59s
  • heavy plus syntax highlighting 1.50s

Everything built in.

No plugins to hunt down. Enable a feature in config.toml and build.

built_in_seo

Sitemaps, feeds, OpenGraph, JSON-LD, and llms.txt. Social card images render at build time, in nineteen styles.

{% set fan = resize_image(path="/images/og-style-examples/style-terminal.png", width=640) %} {% set fan = resize_image(path="/images/og-style-examples/style-bauhaus.png", width=640) %} {% set fan = resize_image(path="/images/og-style-examples/style-editorial.png", width=640) %}

blazing_fast

Parallel rendering, incremental builds, and a streaming mode for very large sites. Thousands of pages in seconds.

markdown_first

TOML front matter, footnotes, task lists, math, and Mermaid.

+++
title = "Hello"
tags = ["crystal"]
toc = true
+++

flexible_templates

Jinja2 templating with inheritance, filters, functions, and shortcodes. No theme lock-in: build your own.

taxonomies

Tags, categories, and custom taxonomies with automatic index pages and pagination.

extensible

Build hooks, asset pipeline, image processing, multilingual support, PWA, and AMP. All in one binary.

Start from a scaffold

Five complete starting points, one shared token system that adapts to light and dark on its own.

{% set scaffolds = [ ["docs", "documentation with sidebar and search"], ["blog", "posts, tags, and feeds"], ["book", "chaptered long-form writing"], ["simple", "landing pages and small sites"], ["bare", "an empty, unopinionated start"] ] %} {% for s in scaffolds %} {% set shot = resize_image(path="/images/scaffolds/scaffold-" ~ s[0] ~ ".png", width=640) %} {% endfor %}

Social cards, drawn at build time

Every page gets an Open Graph image without a browser or an external service. Auto OG Images covers all nineteen styles.

{% set og_styles = ["terminal", "minimal", "gradient", "brutalist", "bauhaus", "editorial", "halftone", "grid", "dots", "waves", "diagonal", "split", "framed", "hero", "monument", "artistic", "band", "surreal", "default"] %}
{% for s in og_styles %} {% set card = resize_image(path="/images/og-style-examples/style-" ~ s ~ ".png", width=640) %} {% endfor %} {% for s in og_styles %} {% set card = resize_image(path="/images/og-style-examples/style-" ~ s ~ ".png", width=640) %} {% endfor %}

Built with Hwaro

Sites from the examples gallery, each one a real build.

{% set examples = [ ["burin", "portfolio"], ["maru", "docs"], ["virga", "blog"], ["gouache", "portfolio"], ["dalbit", "gallery"], ["hanok", "landing"] ] %} {% for ex in examples %} {{ ex[0] }} {{ ex[1] }} {% endfor %}

Start building.

One command to install. A few minutes to your first build.

brew install hahwul/hwaro/hwaro

DEB, RPM, APK, and source builds →

Get started
